name: Add a resource
about: Suggest a new resource (link, tutorial, tool) to add to one of the curated lists
title: "Add [resource name] to [language]/curated-links.md"
labels: ["good first issue", "resource-addition"]

---

## What resource would you like to add?

**Title:**
**URL:**
**One-line description:**

## Which file should it go in?

<!-- e.g. resources/javascript/curated-links.md -->

## Which section should it go in?

<!-- e.g. "Learning the language", "Tools worth knowing" -->

## Why is this a useful resource?

<!-- One or two sentences. What does it teach? Who is it good for? -->

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The entry follows the file's existing format: `- [Title](url) — one-line description.`
- [ ] The entry is added in alphabetical order within its section.
- [ ] The link is to the original source (not a mirror or aggregator).

## Estimated time

5–10 minutes.

## Want to work on this?

Comment below to claim it before you start. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the full first-PR walkthrough.
